name: ted-mcp
description: Search and retrieve EU public procurement notices from TED (Tenders Electronic Daily). No API key required.

tools.name: search_notices
tools.description: Search published EU procurement notices using TED expert query language (filters by country, CPV code, notice type, date range, etc.)

tools.name: get_notice
tools.description: Retrieve full details of a specific TED notice by its document number (e.g. '123456-2024')

tools.name: get_notice_xml
tools.description: Download the complete XML content of a TED notice (full description, technical specs, award criteria)

tools.name: get_notice_docs_url
tools.description: Extract the procurement documents URL (DCE/tender dossier) from a TED notice
